_comment: User-intent install profiles. Each profile is a curated set of skills, commands, hooks, and plugin bundles for a specific workflow context.

profiles.name: safe-core
profiles.description: Essential safety disciplines: powerup discovery, clean communication, planning, and no-secrets enforcement.

profiles.name: dev-loop
profiles.description: Full developer loop: workflow vitals, debugging diagnostics, and quality gates.

profiles.name: data-engineer
profiles.description: Analytics engineering: dbt workflows, BigQuery cost audit, metric impact analysis, and SQL logic review.

profiles.name: release-maintainer
profiles.description: Release readiness: quality gates, documentation systems, and codebase maintenance.

profiles.name: research-heavy
profiles.description: Research-first workflows: search before building, context retrieval loop, and model routing.
